title: Italian Aubergine Crumble
description: A twist on the classic Italian dish, featuring aubergine and a crumbly topping.
instructions: Cut the aubergine into 1/2-inch thick slices.
In a large bowl, toss the aubergine slices with salt, pepper, and a drizzle of olive oil.
Transfer the aubergine to a baking sheet and roast for 20-25 minutes, or until tender.
In a separate pan, sauté the onion and garlic in butter until softened.
Add the crumble mixture to the pan and cook for 2-3 minutes, stirring constantly.
Transfer the aubergine to a baking dish and top with the crumble mixture.
Sprinkle parmesan cheese over the top and bake for an additional 10-15 minutes, or until golden brown.
Remove from the oven and garnish with fresh basil.
